name: GaugeFlow P5-C0 periodic-path representability audit and fixed-lift repair v1
scope: Audit only first. Train exactly one fixed-lift successor only if the frozen branch-switch rule is met. Preserve D0.4 and D0.5--D0.8 unchanged.

lift_search.relative_shift_candidates: complete finite top-two enumeration: use a known second-feasible cost B2 and enumerate ||K_i-r_i||_2 <= sqrt(n*B2)/sigma_min(L), with K_0=0

branch_switch_rule.confirmed_if: At least one nonterminal adjacent-time lift/permutation label change has quotient path-consistency jump >= 0.01, or at least one 1e-4 perturbation changes the lift/permutation and produces quotient target-displacement jump >= 0.01.

repair_if_triggered.name: fixed source-endpoint lift on universal cover
repair_if_triggered.coupling: solve and freeze (pi*,K*,tau*) once per source before training
repair_if_triggered.path: f_t_tilde=(1-t)f0_tilde+t f1_tilde; do not wrap during training or sampling

time_sampling.distribution: independent Uniform[0,1] per source per step

training_if_triggered.loss: translation-quotient fixed universal-cover velocity MSE only
